manifest.name: bqa_synthetic_archive_v1.0.0
manifest.description: Synthetic BQA archive for local browser demo flows.

sessions.title: Synthetic checkout regression triage
sessions.summary: Agent identified missing validation around checkout event normalization.

sessions.title: Synthetic release readiness review
sessions.summary: Agent converted release notes into QA checks and handoff notes.

agents.name: DataIngestionAgent
agents.description: Discovers input files, validates schemas, and normalizes synthetic source records.

agents.name: ReleaseQAAssistant
agents.description: Builds release verification checklists from synthetic release notes.

agents.name: DriftGuard
agents.description: Compares current work against acceptance criteria and warns on scope drift.

knowledge.title: Release Readiness Pattern
knowledge.content: Convert change notes into checks, evidence links, and explicit approval criteria.

knowledge.title: Synthetic Data Rule
knowledge.content: Demo fixtures use invented identifiers, fake sessions, and public-safe examples only.

recommendations.title: Add install smoke coverage
recommendations.body: Run the installer in a temporary repository before long autopilot runs.

recommendations.title: Prepare demo script
recommendations.body: Use the synthetic archive to show upload, validation, artifact review, and result download.
